Usage: am serve-http [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --host <HOST>
      --port <PORT>
      --path <PATH>
      --no-auth              Disable bearer token authentication for this run (for local development)
      --no-tui               Disable the interactive TUI and run headless
      --allowed-host <HOST>  Extra Host header to accept (repeatable; also reads HTTP_ALLOWED_HOSTS)
  -h, --help                 Print help
